tools.name: GetMyDetails
tools.description: Retrieve profile details for the currently signed-in user ("me, my"). Use this when you need the signed-in user's identity or profile details (e.g., display name, email, job title), including for email/calendar scenarios and for questions like "who are you" or any identity question using "you" or "your".

select.description: Always pass in comma-separated list of properties you need

tools.name: GetUserDetails
tools.description: Find a specified user's profile by name, email, or ID. Use this when you need to look up a specific person in your organization.

userIdentifier.description: The user's name or object ID (GUID) or userPrincipalName (email-like UPN).

select.description: Always pass in comma-separated list of properties you need

expand.description: Expand a related entity for the user

tools.name: GetMultipleUsersDetails
tools.description: Search for multiple users in the directory by name, job title, office location, or other properties.

searchValues.description: List of search terms (e.g., ['John Smith', 'Jane Doe'] or ['Software Engineer', 'Product Manager'] or ['Building 40', 'Building 41']). Each term is searched independently - results include users matching ANY term.

select.description: Comma-separated list of user properties to include in response (e.g., 'displayName,mail,jobTitle,officeLocation,mobilePhone')

expand.description: Navigation properties to expand (e.g., 'manager' to include manager details)

orderby.description: Property name to sort results by (e.g., 'displayName', 'jobTitle')

tools.name: GetManagerDetails
tools.description: Get a user's manager information - name, email, job title, etc.,

userId.description: Name of the user whose manager to retrieve. Use "me" for current / signed-in user.

select.description: Always pass in comma-separated list of properties you need

tools.name: GetDirectReportsDetails
tools.description: Retrieve a user's team, or direct reports (people who report to them in the organizational hierarchy). Use this for organizational team structure, NOT for Microsoft Teams workspace membership. Examples for calling this tool: 'set up meeting with John's team', 'who reports to Sarah', 'list manager's direct reports'.

userId.description: Name of the user whose direct reports (organizational team members) to retrieve. Use "me" for current / signed-in user.

select.description: Always pass in comma-separated list of properties you need for each direct report
